items.title: Assembly Elections 2026 LIVE updates: AAP's Arvind Kejriwal to campaign in support of DMK in Tamil Nadu
items.summary: The Aam Aadmi Party has not put up any candidate for the Assembly poll race in Tamil Nadu, choosing to support the Secular Progressive Alliance instead
